user.title: Connect to Folding@home v8
user.description: Host/IP address and port of your FAHv8 instance. Note that FAHv8 WebSocket API has no authentication and traffic is unencrypted. Make sure that you're connecting over a trusted network.

reconfigure.title: Update Folding@home v8 connection
reconfigure.description: Host/IP address and port of your FAHv8 instance. Note that FAHv8 WebSocket API has no authentication and traffic is unencrypted. Make sure that you're connecting over a trusted network.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Folding@home websocket
error.invalid_snapshot: The websocket did not return a valid Folding@home snapshot

abort.already_configured: This Folding@home client is already configured
